title: sisymbrium austriacum subsp. tilieri
intro: Sisymbrium austriacum subsp. tilieri, also known as the Austrian hedge mustard or Austrian rocket, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used fresh in salads or as a cooking green, to harness its medicinal properties.
